purpose: Reusable repository that stores only test steps and expected results.

rules.record_format: Each record must contain crumstep, step, and expected_result.
quality_checks: Each step has one expected result
Expected results are observable and testable
Step length must be 180 characters or fewer
Expected result length must be 220 characters or fewer

azure_devops_text_standard.readability_rule: Keep text short enough to remain fully visible and readable in Azure DevOps test step columns without truncation.

step_result_pairs.expected_result: The user can see the SIS2 application running correctly in the development environment.
